name: Dave the Diver
description: Trainer for Dave the Diver (Proton, Unity IL2CPP). Class layout from Il2CppDumper. Patches target PlayerBreathHandler methods in GameAssembly.dll.

fields.name: Infinite Oxygen
fields.description: NOPs PlayerBreathHandler.BreathUpdate so oxygen never decreases while diving.

patches.description: Replace 'push rdi' with 'ret; nop' at PlayerBreathHandler.BreathUpdate — breath consumption skipped

fields.name: Invincible
fields.description: Installs a code cave on set_HP that blocks damage (value decreases) while allowing healing (value increases). Oxygen barrels and healing still work.

patches.description: Code cave on PlayerBreathHandler.set_HP: load current HP, compare with new value, return if damage. Stolen bytes: push rbx; sub rsp,0x30; movaps [rsp+0x20],xmm6; xor edx,edx

fields.name: One-Hit Kill
fields.description: Sets FishAISystem.cheatDamage to 99999 via the game's built-in static cheat field. All fish die in one hit from any weapon.

on_enable.description: Set cheatDamage.hasValue=1 via FishAISystem TypeInfo -> static_fields -> +0x8
